body.title: Add pre-flight test check to pe_chain
body.result: Added preflight TEST step before HYPOTHESIZE in pe_entry_chain(). If tests fail pre-edit, escalate immediately with 'pre-flight: test suite broken'. Prevents 3 wasted attempts on unrelated breakage. pe_test() now accepts preflight param for logging.
body.description: pe_test() runs AFTER all edits. If test suite already broken, chain exhausts 3 attempts replanning a non-existent problem. Run tests BEFORE hypothesize. If they fail, escalate immediately with reason 'test suite broken — not attempting fixes'.
